name: Banana Oatmeal Cookies w/ Banana Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups Oats (quick), NOT instant or old fashioned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine Crisco and sugar; stir until well blended.
3. Beat in egg and mashed bananas. Stir in oats, flour, salt, cinnamon, baking soda, and nutmeg.
4. Fold in walnuts.
5. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake 12 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool on wire racks.
